idea-plugin.name: AgentHub
idea-plugin.description:
AgentHub adds a toolbar button to every JetBrains IDE that launches any popular CLI coding agent in its own terminal window — one click, no setup. Works with IntelliJ IDEA, PhpStorm, WebStorm, PyCharm, GoLand, Rider and the rest.

Highlights

  • 30 built-in agents — Claude Code (Anthropic), Codex CLI (OpenAI), Grok Build (xAI), Antigravity CLI (Google), Copilot CLI (GitHub), Cursor, Aider, Qodo, Qwen Code, Goose, OpenCode and many more.
  • One-click launch from the toolbar — or install a missing agent through a confirmation dialog.
  • Auto-detection of installed agents on startup.
  • Update notifications — a background check flags agents that have a newer version.
  • Manage from Settings — install, update or remove any agent.
  • Custom agent — add your own CLI tool with a name, command and URL.
  • Cross-platform — macOS, Linux and Windows (PowerShell helper script).

Open Settings/Preferences → Tools → AgentHub to choose which agents appear in the toolbar dropdown and to configure your custom agent.

Supported agents

  • Aider — Aider AI
  • Amp — Sourcegraph
  • Antigravity CLI — Google
  • Auggie — Augment
  • Claude Code — Anthropic
  • Cline — Cline
  • Codex CLI — OpenAI
  • Cody CLI — Sourcegraph
  • Continue CLI — Continue
  • Copilot CLI — GitHub
  • Crush — Charm
  • Cursor CLI — Cursor
  • Droid — Factory AI
  • ForgeCode — Antinomy
  • Goose CLI — Block
  • Grok Build — xAI
  • Kilo Code — Kilo
  • Kimi Code — Moonshot AI
  • Kiro CLI — Kiro
  • LeanCTL — LeanCTL
  • MiMo Code — Xiaomi
  • Mistral Vibe — Mistral AI
  • OpenCode — SST
  • OpenHands — All Hands
  • Plandex — Plandex
  • Qodo — Qodo
  • Qoder CLI — Qoder AI
  • Qwen Code — Alibaba
  • SWE-agent — SWE-agent
  • VT Code — vinhnx

ForgeCode, LeanCTL and Plandex have no native Windows build and are hidden on Windows.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.9.0 — Initial release

  • 30 built-in CLI coding agents
  • One-click launch from toolbar; not-installed agents prompt to install with confirmation
  • Auto-detect on first install and after each plugin update
  • Background update availability check on IDE startup
  • Install / Update / Remove directly from Settings panel
  • Custom agent support: configure your own CLI tool with name, command and URL
  • Cross-platform: macOS, Linux, Windows (PowerShell helper script)

group.description: Launch CLI coding agents in an IDE terminal. Auto-detects installed agents.
